name: flipcard-monorepo
description: FlipCard — the first primitive in an adaptive, manifest schema-driven, composable UI system

scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:flipdeck
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @microsoft/flipcard-core && npm run build -w @microsoft/flipcard-themes && npm run build -w @microsoft/flipcard-react -w @microsoft/flipcard && npm run build -w @microsoft/flipcard-mcp
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/themes/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/mcp-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/vanilla/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/showcase/tsconfig.json --noEmit
